Lord
Aelyx Targaryen[N 1]
The brothers Aelyx, Baelon, and Daemion Targaryen by coldraindropsss
Title Lord of Dragonstone
Allegiance House Targaryen
Race Valyrian
Born 89–55 BC[1]
Dragonstone
Father Aerys Targaryen
Books
  • The World of Ice & Fire (mentioned)
  • Fire & Blood (mentioned)

Aelyx Targaryen was a member of House Targaryen during the Century of Blood, the first son of Lord Aerys Targaryen of Dragonstone. He had two younger brothers, Baelon and Daemion Targaryen.

Contents

  • 1 History
  • 2 Family
  • 3 Notes
  • 4 References

History[ ]

Aelyx inherited the lordship of Dragonstone from his father and was himself succeeded by his brother Baelon.[2]

Notes:
  1. ↑ One of the claimants of the Great Council of 101 AC was a descendant of Lord Gaemon's younger daughter who married a petty Lord.


Notes[ ]

  1. ↑ The red three-headed dragon was adopted by Aegon I Targaryen after the Conquest. This means that Targaryens prior to the Conquest did not use this coat of arms, and as such it is not displayed in this article.
